title: Task
description: A single task in the Mongolian Spelling & Dictation task bank (Task table in DB)

id.description: Human-readable ID. Format: G12-NNN (Grades 1–2) or G24-NNN (Grades 2–4)

task_type.description: Task type determines the shape of the 'options' JSONB field

correct_answer.description: Canonical correct answer string. Use semicolons for multi-part answers (dictation). 'PLACEHOLDER' for unfinished tasks.

options.description: JSONB payload — shape depends on task_type (see $defs below)

audio_url.description: URL to audio asset (null until asset pipeline is ready)

image_url.description: URL to image asset (null until asset pipeline is ready)

error_targets.description: Error codes this task is designed to surface or remediate

grade_band.description: Target grade(s): G1=Grade 1, G2=Grade 2, G3=Grade 3, G4=Grade 4

lesson_slot_fit.description: Where in a lesson session this task fits best

feedback_text.description: Short corrective feedback shown after an incorrect attempt (Mongolian)

initial_text.description: For TT3_CORRECTION tasks: the incorrect text shown to the learner first (must match options.incorrect_text). Required for correction tasks.

SkillCode.description: S1=Үсэг-авиа ялгалт, S2=Үгийн зөв бичлэг, S3=Урт/богино эгшиг, S4=Балархай эгшиг, S5=Залгавар/нөхцөл, S6=Өгүүлбэрийн тэмдэглэгээ, S7=Сонсголоор буулгах, S8=Алдаа засах

TT1Options.title: TT1_CHOICE options
TT1Options.description: Зөвийг сонгох — learner picks the correct word/spelling from multiple choices

audio_trigger.description: true = play audio automatically; false = image-to-word or spelling task

TT2Options.title: TT2_FILL options
TT2Options.description: Нөхөх — learner types the missing character(s) to complete the word

display_text.description: Word with underscore(s) marking the blank, e.g. 'н_м'

blank_position.description: 0-based character index of the blank in the full word

blank_answer.description: The correct character(s) to fill the blank

context_word.description: Full correct word (used for hints and answer-checking)

TT3Options.title: TT3_CORRECTION options
TT3Options.description: Засвар — learner identifies and corrects an error in the given text

incorrect_text.description: Text containing the error(s) shown to the learner

error_type.description: Primary error code embedded in this task, e.g. 'G1', 'C1', 'H4'

hint.description: Hint shown after a wrong attempt (Mongolian)

TT4Options.title: TT4_DICTATION options
TT4Options.description: Сонсоод бичих — learner transcribes spoken words or a short sentence

audio_text.description: Comma-separated text that will be read aloud, e.g. 'ном, гэр, нар'

word_count.description: Number of words / tokens in the dictation

allow_partial.description: true = partial credit for correctly transcribed tokens

TT5Options.title: TT5_MINI_TEXT options
TT5Options.description: Жижиг эх — learner transcribes a short multi-sentence passage

audio_text.description: Full passage text to be read aloud

sentence_count.description: Number of sentences in the passage (typically 2–3)

expected_answers.description: List of correct sentences in order

TT6Options.title: TT6_SELF_CHECK options
TT6Options.description: Өөрийгөө шалгах — learner compares their earlier attempt to the model answer

model_answer.description: The correct model answer shown for comparison

comparison_mode.description: How the UI presents the comparison to the learner
